title: Emojis
description: Adds /emoji-add and /emoji-copy commands for uploading or cloning custom server emojis.

fields.label: Emoji manager role
fields.help: Members with this role can use /emoji-add and /emoji-copy. Administrators always can. Leave empty for admins only.

fields.label: Disabled reply
fields.help: Shown when someone uses an emoji command while this module is turned off.

fields.label: No permission
fields.help: Shown when the user lacks Administrator and the emoji manager role.

fields.label: Invalid name
fields.help: Shown when the emoji name is not 2–32 alphanumeric/underscore characters.

fields.label: Name taken
fields.help: Shown when the server already has an emoji with that name.

fields.label: Not an image
fields.help: Shown when /emoji-add attachment is not an image file.

fields.label: File too large
fields.help: Shown when the image exceeds Discord's 256 KiB emoji limit.

fields.label: Not a custom emoji
fields.help: Shown when /emoji-copy is given a unicode emoji instead of a custom emoji.

fields.label: Download failed
fields.help: Shown when the bot could not fetch the attachment or CDN image.

fields.label: Bot missing permission
fields.help: Shown when the bot lacks Manage Emojis and Stickers.

fields.label: Emoji slots full
fields.help: Shown when the server has no remaining emoji slots (boost tier limit).

fields.label: Create failed
fields.help: Catch-all when emoji creation fails for an unmapped reason.

fields.label: Success reply
fields.help: Shown when an emoji is created. Token: {emoji}
